layers.name: Project Operations
layers.description: Repository-level Makefiles, Docker Compose, process files, and project configuration.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Repository guides, architecture notes, setup documentation, and operational plans.

layers.name: Backend Support
layers.description: Backend configuration, migrations, scripts, and package metadata.

layers.name: Backend Core
layers.description: Shared backend settings, database, security, logging, and cross-cutting runtime utilities.

layers.name: Backend Entrypoints
layers.description: FastAPI application startup, worker entrypoints, and CLI adapters.

layers.name: Backend Infrastructure
layers.description: Persistence, messaging, vehicle, camera, photogrammetry, and external integration adapters.

layers.name: Backend Domain Modules
layers.description: Mission, telemetry, mapping, warehouse, and operational backend APIs and domain services.

layers.name: Backend Tests
layers.description: Pytest coverage for backend modules and integration boundaries.

layers.name: Frontend Tooling
layers.description: Vite, TypeScript, linting, tests, Docker, and frontend operational configuration.

layers.name: Frontend App Shell
layers.description: React routing, application shell, and top-level browser entry points.

layers.name: Frontend Source
layers.description: Frontend source files outside the main app/module/shared boundaries.

layers.name: Frontend Feature Modules
layers.description: Operator-facing mission, warehouse, maps, telemetry, dashboard, and workflow UI modules.

layers.name: Frontend Shared
layers.description: Reusable frontend UI, API clients, hooks, styles, and utilities.

layers.name: ROS 2 Simulation
layers.description: Gazebo and ROS 2 bridge packages, launch files, and simulation configuration.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the repository README and top-level process files to understand the platform purpose and local development workflow.

tour.title: Backend API Runtime
tour.description: Follow the FastAPI entrypoints into backend core services, domain modules, persistence, telemetry, and vehicle integrations.

tour.title: Frontend Operator Console
tour.description: Inspect the React app shell, feature modules, shared UI, and Vite configuration that power the operator dashboard.

tour.title: Simulation And Mapping
tour.description: Review ROS 2 bridge files, warehouse scanning code, live-map streaming, and photogrammetry orchestration paths.

tour.title: Quality And Operations
tour.description: Close with tests, linting, observability, Docker, and deployment configuration that support running the platform.
